HomePage.title: Master your technical interviews with AI
HomePage.subtitle: The ultimate interview simulator for software engineers. Practice coding, architecture, and soft skills.
HomePage.demoError: Could not start demo. Try again.
HomePage.sampleQuestionsSubtitle: Real questions from our bank — no signup needed to try them.
HomePage.demoLimitNote: Demo includes 3 questions · Create an account for full access
HomePage.feature1Desc: Dynamic scenarios tailored to your tech stack. From algorithms to system design.
HomePage.feature2Desc: Instant analysis of Big O, readability, and design patterns using advanced language models.
HomePage.feature3Desc: Real-time time pressure and anxiety tracking via voice analysis and typing patterns.
HomePage.archDesc: You don't just solve problems, you design global-scale solutions. Practice diagramming and technical justification of complex infrastructures.
HomePage.statsDesc: Our users have been hired by the world's most disruptive companies thanks to our surgical preparation.

Metadata.title: DevPrep | AI Interview Coach

Analytics.subtitle: Insights based on your last {count} sessions

Analytics.noDataDesc: Complete at least one interview session to unlock your progress tracking and performance insights.

Login.subtitle: Sign in to start your preparation.
Login.terms: By continuing, you accept the Terms of Service

SessionConfig.title: Create New Session
SessionConfig.subtitle: Configure your practice environment and start improving your skills with our AI-assisted interview engine.
SessionConfig.techAreaDesc: Choose the technology or technical area you want to focus on for this practice session.
SessionConfig.difficultyDesc: Define the difficulty of the questions and the technical rigor expected during the simulation.
SessionConfig.languageDesc: Select the interview language. This will affect both the questions and the evaluation.
SessionConfig.modeDesc: Choose the session format: a quick technical quiz or a complete immersive experience.
SessionConfig.durationEstimate: Estimated based on category and difficulty. Actual time may vary.

Settings.title: Account Configuration
Settings.label: Account Configuration
Settings.subtitle: Configure your training preferences and AI environment.
Settings.feedbackLiveDesc: See your score and evaluation after each answer. Best for learning and active practice.
Settings.feedbackSilentDesc: Answer all questions first, then see results at the end. Simulates a real exam environment.
Settings.sectionCategoriesNote: These preferences will be used automatically when starting quick sessions from the main dashboard.

Bookmarks.title: Bookmarks
Bookmarks.subtitle: Your saved questions and review queue
Bookmarks.noDueDesc: No questions due for review. Check back tomorrow.
Bookmarks.noBookmarksDesc: Bookmark questions during sessions to review them later.
Bookmarks.noModelAnswer: No model answer available for this question.
Bookmarks.dueToday: {count, plural, one {# question} other {# questions}} due today

History.title: Session History
History.subtitle: Review your past interviews and analyze your progress
History.total: {count, plural, one {# session} other {# sessions}} total
History.deleteConfirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. All messages and feedback for this session will be deleted.
